name: 🎄Winter & Molly🎄 ~ Christmas Special
description:
"Merry Christmas!" "Merry Christmas!"

The not-very-long awaited return of Winter and Molly. I wanted to release this closer to Christmas but I got lazy and distracted and etcetera. But we're here now and I've got a new collection of intro messages for y'all.

Also don't worry the rest of Mentha's sisters are still coming.

Intro Messages:

1. They got you a watch!

2. Winter put Molly in charge of their costumes for their Christmas party. Big mistake.

3. Mistletoe Incident (Winter)

(I got no fitting art so here's a pic of Winter and her family (I don't know their names))

4. Mistletoe Incident (Molly)

(I got no fitting art so here's a pic of Molly and her family)

5. Frost Burn (it's the double heat scenario y'all wanted. Also I don't really have good art for it so have this instead)

Why would she say that

Check my profile for the other bots I made featuring Winter & Molly.

🎨: Art by Nelljoestar
